account.title: Account
account.loginPrompt: Sign in to sync your settings and access them on all devices.
account.articleCount: {count, plural, =0 {No articles} one {# article} other {# articles}}
account.confirmDeleteHistory: Do you want to delete your entire reading history?

reading.title: Reading & Personalization
reading.personalizationDesc: 'For You' suggestions based on reading history
reading.pauseTrackingDesc: Reading activity will not be recorded

perspectives.title: Default Perspectives
perspectives.description: Select the perspectives that load automatically on startup

presets.title: Filter Presets
presets.createHint: Complete onboarding to create custom focus presets
presets.confirmDelete: Do you want to delete the preset "{name}"?

focusManagement.title: Focus Management
focusManagement.description: Manage your Focus Presets. Built-in presets cannot be edited.

api.title: API Configuration
api.description: Configure your API keys for extended features.
api.deeplHint: For automatic translations. Free at deepl.com/pro-api

dataCache.title: Data & Cache
dataCache.exportDesc: Export all settings, presets, and preferences as JSON file
dataCache.clearCacheDesc: Remove cached article data and force a full reload
dataCache.confirmClearCache: Do you really want to clear the entire cache?

connectedAccounts.title: Connected Accounts
connectedAccounts.description: Link your Google or GitHub account for faster login
connectedAccounts.noPasswordHint: You're using OAuth-only login. Set a password in Security settings before unlinking all providers.
connectedAccounts.unlinkMessage: Are you sure you want to unlink {{provider}}? You can reconnect anytime.
